rules.rule_text:
title: Windows Defender Threat Detected
id: 57b649ef-ff42-4fb0-8bf6-62da243a1708
status: stable
description: Detects actions taken by Windows Defender malware detection engines
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/defender-endpoint/troubleshoot-microsoft-defender-antivirus
author: "J\xE1n Tren\u010Dansk\xFD"
date: 2020-07-28
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: windefend
detection:
  selection:
    EventID:
    - 1006
    - 1015
    - 1116
    - 1117
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
